revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term |name=From an ambiguous term |from=an ambiguous page name |to=a page or list that disambiguates it |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from ambiguous terms |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized ambiguous term talk page redirects]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term |name=From an ambiguous term |from=an ambiguous page name |to=a page or list that disambiguates it |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from ambiguous terms |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||[[Category:Unsynchronized ambiguous term talk page redirects]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from ambiguous terms |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term |name=From an ambiguous term |from=an ambiguous page name |to=a page or list that disambiguates it |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from ambiguous terms |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||}}}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term |name=From an ambiguous term |from=an ambiguous page name |to=a page or list that disambiguates it |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from ambiguous terms |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term |name=From an ambiguous term |from=an ambiguous page name |to=a page or list that disambiguates it |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from ambiguous terms |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||}}}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term |name=From an ambiguous term |from=an ambiguous page name |to=a page or list that disambiguates it |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from ambiguous terms |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}||}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term |name=From an ambiguous term |from=an ambiguous page name |to=a page or list that disambiguates it |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated.
